name: reame
desc: A lean, fully-tested LLM inference server for the hardware you already have — free tiers, shared VPS, 2-core ARM boxes. OpenAI-compatible API on llama.cpp. On …
descFull: A lean, fully-tested LLM inference server for the hardware you already have — free tiers, shared VPS, 2-core ARM boxes. OpenAI-compatible API on llama.cpp. On a CPU, never compute the same thing twice: it caches prompts, prefixes and past generations to disk, so request #100 costs a fraction of request #1.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Reame – a CPU inference server that gets faster as it runs
